name: Deep Yellow Limited
content: Deep Yellow Limited is an advanced Australian-based uranium exploration and development company with a primary focus on its projects in Namibia and Australia. The company is strategically positioned to become a significant global uranium producer through the development of its flagship Tumas Project in Namibia and the Mulga Rock Project in Western Australia. Led by an experienced management team with a proven track record in the uranium sector, Deep Yellow is committed to creating long-term shareholder value by executing a dual-pillar growth strategy involving both organic development and inorganic acquisitions.
